scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install; npm --prefix frontend install; npm --prefix perf-checker install
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend,perf -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm --prefix backend run start" "npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --port 6002" "npm --prefix perf-checker run dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend,perf -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --port 6002" "npm --prefix perf-checker run dev"
